rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts is unrelated to Elec. Code §86.001, which governs early voting clerk review of mail ballot applications. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 86.001. REVIEWING APPLICATION AND PROVIDING BALLOT. (a) The early voting clerk shall review each application for a ballot to be voted by mail.
_note: No conflict; the cited election code provision concerns mail-in ballot application review and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
